calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Reforming Trust [Prob Code Sec 17200(B)(6), 17200.1; 850(A)(3)(B); 17200(B)(13)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vivian Redsar for Petitioner Samuel Salkin.

Counsel presented oral argument to support her position with regard to the Powers of Attorney (POA). The Court granted the petition that the real properties are in the trust pursuant to the POA and the 850 Petition on the bank accounts. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
